tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[tab](capo 2nd fret) [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
"The Best Day"[/tab]


[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
We loaded up my old stationwagon[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
With a tent a coleman and sleepin' bags[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]C[/ch]
Some fishin' poles a cooler of cokes[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Three days before we had to be back[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]
When you're seven you're in seventh heaven[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
When you're going campin' in the wild outdoors[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
As we turned off on that old dirt road[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
He looked at me and swore…[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Dad, this could be the best day of my life[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
I've been dreamin' day and night about the fun we'll have[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
Just me and you doing what I've always wanted to[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
I'm the luckiest boy alive this is the best day of my life.[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
His fifteenth birthday rolled around[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Classic cars were his thing[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]C[/ch]
When I pulled in the drive with that old Vette[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
I thought that boy would go insane[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]
When you're in your teens[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Your dreams revolve around four spinnin' wheels[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
We worked nights on end till it was new again[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
And as he sat behind the wheel…[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Dad, this could be the best day of my life[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
I've been dreamin' day and night about the fun we'll have[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
Just me and you doing what I've always wanted to[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
I'm the luckiest boy alive this is the best day of my life[/tab]

[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Standin' in a little room in back of the church with our tux's on[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Lookin' at him I say, I can't believe son that you're grown…[/tab]

[Chorus]

[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]
He said Dad, this could be the best day of my life[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I've been dreamin' day and night of being like you[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]
Now it's me and her watchin' you and Mom I've learned[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
I'm the luckiest man alive, this is the best day of my life[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
I'm the luckiest man alive, this is the best day of my life.[/tab]
